title: Deliciously Molten German White Chocolate Bowl
description: A festive German dessert featuring molten white chocolate, served in a stone bowl, perfect for any occasion, and is egg-free friendly.
instructions: Melt the white chocolate chips in a double boiler over low heat, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, granulated sugar, and unsalted butter until well combined.
Add the vanilla extract to the cream mixture and whisk until smooth.
Pour the cream mixture over the melted white chocolate and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the stone bowl and place under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let cool for 1 minute.
Garnish with fresh raspberries and serve immediately.
Be careful when handling the hot stone bowl.
Serve in the stone bowl and enjoy the molten white chocolate.
You can also add other toppings such as whipped cream or chopped nuts.
